empiricalResult.title: Empirical Result
empiricalResult.description: Token-count statistics gathered by running the bench command across multiple live API calls.

runs.description: Number of bench runs that produced these statistics.

input_mean.description: Mean input token count across all runs.

output_mean.description: Mean output token count across all runs.

input_min.description: Minimum input token count observed across all runs.

input_max.description: Maximum input token count observed across all runs.

output_min.description: Minimum output token count observed across all runs.

output_max.description: Maximum output token count observed across all runs.

budget_spent.description: Total input tokens consumed across all runs (sum of per-run input counts).

title: ClaudeBench Snapshot
description: Schema for a snapshot file produced by `python claude_bench.py snapshot`. Records the token footprint of every Claude Code component in a config directory at a point in time.

taken_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the snapshot was taken (e.g. 2026-06-18T10:30:00Z).

label.description: Optional human-readable label for this snapshot; null when omitted.

config_dir.description: Absolute path to the scanned Claude config directory (e.g. ~/.claude resolved to a real path).

model.description: Model identifier whose tokenizer was used to count tokens (e.g. claude-opus-4-8).

tokenizer.description: Tokenizer strategy used: 'count_tokens' = live API call; 'claude-p-fallback' = cl100k_base character heuristic.

totals.description: Aggregate token counts across all components in the snapshot.

always_loaded.description: Sum of tokens_always_loaded over all components.

invocation.description: Sum of tokens_invocation over all components (null values treated as 0).

by_kind.description: Breakdown of always_loaded token sums grouped by component kind.

skill.description: Sum of always_loaded tokens for all skill components.

agent.description: Sum of always_loaded tokens for all agent components.

mcp.description: Sum of always_loaded tokens for all MCP components.

memory.description: Sum of always_loaded tokens for all memory components.

rule.description: Sum of always_loaded tokens for all rule components.

setting.description: Sum of always_loaded tokens for all setting components.

components.description: List of individual Claude Code components discovered and measured in the config directory.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the component (e.g. 'Commit Message').

path.description: Path to the component's source file, relative to config_dir, using forward slashes.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the component's source content, prefixed with 'sha256:'.

tokens_always_loaded.description: Number of tokens from this component that are always present in the model context.

tokens_invocation.description: Number of tokens loaded only when the component is invoked; null if not applicable or unmeasured.

empirical.description: Live-API bench statistics for this component, or null if bench has not been run.
